methodology.title: How JHI and transport are calculated
methodology.jhi_formula: Percent change in income from commute × 1.5 = JHI points
methodology.jhi_example: Example: If commute reduces income by 1%, JHI drops by ~1.5 points
methodology.final_formula: Net base + Benefits - Commute = Real Income
methodology.jhi_desc: A numeric index that measures the "health" of a job offer. It is calculated from multiple factors:
methodology.pillar_financial_desc: How salary + benefits - commute affects your total income
methodology.pillar_time_desc: How commuting and work type (remote/hybrid/on-site) affects your free time
methodology.pillar_mental_desc: Words like "fast-paced", "stress" or "high pressure" reduce the score
methodology.pillar_growth_desc: Training, courses and education increase the score
methodology.jhi_example_long: Example: If commute reduces net income by 1%, JHI drops by ~1.5 points. Capped to -20 to +15 points.
methodology.transport_desc: The system uses your preferred transport and applies the lowest cost option:

financial.reality_desc: Calculation of net income and commuting costs.

welcome.subtitle: Find work that makes sense — with transparent pay, benefits, and AI analysis.

subtitle_items: Gross pay lies. How much do you really keep?
The offer looks great. But what will it cost you each month?

page_what_is.desc_1: JobShaman is not a job portal. It's not a career coach. It's not an AI that writes your cover letter.
page_what_is.desc_2: JobShaman is math. It's reality. It's your net income after deducting taxes, insurance and commute costs.
page_what_is.desc_3: We manually analyze every job offer. We evaluate the real impact on your life — not just what the company wanted to write.
page_what_is.card_1_desc: No guessing. Every job is analyzed according to clear criteria.
page_what_is.card_2_desc: You see all calculations. Nothing happens in a black box.
page_what_is.card_3_desc: Algorithms where data exists. AI where there is no other solution.
page_what_is.desc_4: We are the only portal that analyzes a user's profile based on skills and can offer a suitable course to improve their position in the labor market or to get their dream job.

page_mobile.desc_1: On mobile? JobShaman now offers Tinder-like swiping to browse jobs effortlessly.
page_mobile.desc_2: Swipe left to pass, swipe right to save. One job at a time. No endless scrolling. No information overload.
page_mobile.desc_3: See your progress with a beautiful counter and progress bar. When you're done, get a summary of what you've reviewed and how many you saved.
page_mobile.swipe_desc: Swipe left to pass on a job, swipe right to save it. Simple, fast, and feels natural.
page_mobile.mobile_desc: Automatically enabled on mobile and tablet devices. The desktop layout is still available when you need it.
page_mobile.progress_desc: See which job you're on, a progress bar, and completion stats. Stay motivated as you browse.
page_mobile.tip_text: Tap the job card to view full details in the expanded view. You can still access all your filters and saved jobs from the top menu.

faq.title: FAQ for companies
faq.q1: How can you be cheaper and still more relevant?
faq.a1: We optimize for quality responses, not for maximum volume of random applications.
faq.q2: What if a candidate does not have a perfect CV?
faq.a2: We evaluate skills and context of experience. CV style is not the main signal.
faq.q3: How do you measure response quality?
faq.a3: We track impressions, detail opens, responses, and other funnel signals.
faq.q4: Does it work without AI assessment?
faq.a4: Yes. Better relevance and conversion already come from core matching and behavior signals.
faq.q5: How do you handle data protection?
faq.a5: We use controlled data access and transparent logging of key recommendation steps.

trust.i1: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
trust.i2: Measurable funnel from impression to response
trust.i3: Relevant responses even without AI assessment

faq.renewal_a: Your subscription renews automatically on the date shown in your dashboard. Your payment method on file will be charged. You can pause or cancel anytime.
faq.pause_a: Yes. You can pause your subscription to keep your data without billing. Contact support to pause for up to 3 months.
faq.plan_contents_q: What is included in each plan?
faq.plan_free: Free: Limited access to jobs, basic features
faq.plan_business: Professional: Unlimited assessments, unlimited postings, priority support
faq.plan_bundle: Assessment bundle: 50 one-time assessments valid for 12 months
faq.rollover_a: No. Monthly credits reset on renewal day. Assessment bundle purchases remain valid for 12 months from purchase.
faq.support_a: Email us at support@jobshaman.cz or use the in-app chat widget. Business users get 24/7 priority support.
faq.plan_basic_v2: Basic: 5 job posts, 5 AI assessments, basic matching.
faq.plan_professional_v2: Professional: 20 job posts, 50 AI assessments, JHI insights.

demo_handshake.title: Try an interactive first contact without signing in.
demo_handshake.subtitle: A real team challenge, two short responses, and a simulated first company reply. No silence without status.
demo_handshake.challenge_title: Chaotic handoff between reception and housekeeping shifts
demo_handshake.challenge_meta: Private thread • Clear states • No public pressure
demo_handshake.challenge_body: The team keeps passing incomplete information and operations slow down. The company wants to see your first step, trade-off, and validation approach.
demo_handshake.role_truth_1: Hardest part: stabilize shift handoffs without creating more friction.
demo_handshake.role_truth_2: Typical failure: fast assumptions without field validation.
demo_handshake.role_truth_3: The company commits to a clear status instead of silent waiting.
demo_handshake.prompt_one: What is your first move in the first 7 days to reduce shift handoff errors?
demo_handshake.prompt_two: You hit a speed-vs-quality priority conflict. How do you decide and what do you communicate to the team?
demo_handshake.prompt_hint: Keep it concise and concrete. Show your thinking process, not polished self-presentation.
demo_handshake.placeholder_one: Describe the first step, validation signal, and what you would measure.
demo_handshake.placeholder_two: Describe the trade-off, your decision, and how you would communicate it.
demo_handshake.min_chars_error: Both answers must be at least {{count}} characters.
demo_handshake.first_reply_title: The first company reply proves this is not another black hole.
demo_handshake.first_reply_company_1: Thanks for your reply. We appreciate that you start with mapping shift handoffs.
demo_handshake.first_reply_candidate_1: I would first audit cross-shift handoffs and introduce one shared checklist.
demo_handshake.first_reply_company_2: That is exactly our issue. We want to continue the dialogue.
demo_handshake.state_rule_body: A new active dialogue unlocks only after both sides respond. No response closes the thread.
demo_handshake.completed_body: This is how first contact works in JobShaman: short, private, and explicit states instead of uncertainty.
demo_handshake.prefilled_answer_one: In week one I would map shift handoff quality across two pilot shifts. I would introduce a lightweight checklist with clear ownership and track incomplete handoffs.
demo_handshake.prefilled_answer_two: If speed conflicts with quality, I would prioritize safe and repeatable handoff first. I would communicate the short-term trade-off and review impact after 14 days.
demo_handshake.prefilled_notice: Demo answers are prefilled, and you can edit them.
demo_handshake.supporting_context_desc: This is how document attachments and JCFPM sharing appear in the flow.
demo_handshake.include_documents_help: CV and short context remain supporting material for first contact.
demo_handshake.include_jcfpm_help: The company sees only a compact hiring summary, not the private report.
demo_handshake.jcfpm_share_desc: The private narrative profile remains candidate-only.
demo_handshake.completed_context_docs_jcfpm: This demo included both document attachments and JCFPM summary.
demo_handshake.completed_context_docs_only: This demo included document attachments without JCFPM summary.
demo_handshake.completed_context_jcfpm_only: This demo included JCFPM summary without document attachments.
demo_handshake.completed_context_none: This demo was submitted without additional context attachments.
demo_handshake.demo_listing_badge: How the listing looks in practice
demo_handshake.demo_listing_overview_body: You will establish a shift handoff ritual, reduce handoff errors, and set clear priorities during peak operations.
demo_handshake.demo_listing_success_title: What success looks like in 6 months
demo_handshake.demo_listing_success_body: Fewer escalations, steadier operations, transparent shift handoff, and clear accountability across teams.
demo_handshake.demo_listing_truth_body: The hardest part is not task volume, but consistent cross-shift coordination.
demo_handshake.thread_opened_title: The demo thread is opened exactly like in the live flow.
demo_handshake.candidate_followup_fallback: I would start with a shift handoff audit and follow with a lightweight checklist.
demo_handshake.live_thread_hint: Below you see the same principle as in live dialogue: company message -> your response -> follow-up.
demo_handshake.company_typing: Company is writing a follow-up message...
demo_handshake.thread_status_waiting_candidate: It is now the candidate turn. After response, the company continues.
demo_handshake.thread_status_waiting_company: Candidate responded. Company is preparing a follow-up question.
demo_handshake.thread_status_continue: Both sides responded, so the dialogue continues without ghosting.
demo_handshake.thread_plain_step_one: Company replies first and sets a clear status.
demo_handshake.thread_plain_step_two: After both responses, the next dialogue step unlocks.
demo_handshake.thread_component_subtitle: The same async thread experience as in the live application flow.
demo_handshake.thread_component_empty: No messages yet. Start with a short candidate reply.
demo_handshake.prefilled_followup_notice: The reply is prefilled. You can continue by clicking Send reply.
demo_handshake.prefilled_followup_message: Thanks for your first response. In week one I would review handoff quality across two pilot shifts, introduce one shared checklist, and share measurable outcomes with the team after 14 days.
demo_handshake.thread_component_placeholder: Add a short follow-up or send the prefilled draft…

demo_company_handshake.title: Try the company-side handshake flow with real UI components.
demo_company_handshake.subtitle: You get the full path: Role Canvas, candidate arrival, first company reply, candidate follow-up, and a clear no-ghosting status.
demo_company_handshake.role_summary: We are hiring someone to stabilize shift handoffs between front desk and housekeeping and set a clear operating rhythm.
demo_company_handshake.role_truth_item_1: The hard part is handoff quality between morning and afternoon shifts.
demo_company_handshake.role_truth_item_2: Without strict checklist ownership, quality drops quickly.
demo_company_handshake.role_truth_item_3: Within six weeks we need measurable reduction in guest escalations.
demo_company_handshake.incoming_title: A candidate replied and opened a private thread.
demo_company_handshake.candidate_signal_one: I would audit shift handoffs first, extract recurring failure points, and align one checklist for front desk and housekeeping.
demo_company_handshake.candidate_signal_two: In week one I would run 15-minute pre-shift standups and launch a shared logbook with clear ownership.
demo_company_handshake.candidate_packet_hint: Click any attachment to open the full version in a new tab.
demo_company_handshake.company_reply_title: First company reply and candidate follow-up
demo_company_handshake.status_company_turn: Waiting for your first company reply.
demo_company_handshake.status_candidate_turn: First reply sent. Candidate turn is active.
demo_company_handshake.status_ready: Candidate replied. Thread is ready for the next step.
demo_company_handshake.progress_three: Candidate follows up and unlocks continuation
demo_company_handshake.thread_hint: Same thread component as in production flow.
demo_company_handshake.thread_loading: First candidate message is coming in…
demo_company_handshake.prefilled_notice: The company reply is prefilled. Just click Send.
demo_company_handshake.candidate_returned_notice: Candidate replied. You can move to the next step.
demo_company_handshake.thread_subtitle: Real async thread component used in the company dashboard.
demo_company_handshake.composer_placeholder: Write the first company reply… (in production you can attach a document, image, or contract draft)
demo_company_handshake.prefilled_company_reply: Thanks for the structured approach. Shift handoff is exactly our core issue. We want to continue.
demo_company_handshake.candidate_followup: Thank you. I prepared a short 14-day pilot plan. If useful, I can share it as the next supporting document.
demo_company_handshake.completed_body: Both sides replied, the thread has a clear state, and the next step unlocked without uncertainty.
